name: Madolche Hootcake
name_jp: マドルチェ・ホーットケーキ
desc: If this card in your possession is destroyed by an opponent's card and sent to your GY: Shuffle this card into the Deck. You can target 1 monster in your GY; banish it, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Madolche" monster from your Deck, except "Madolche Hootcake". You can only use this effect of "Madolche Hootcake" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card in your possession is destroyed by an opponent's card and sent to your GY: Shuffle this card into the Deck. You can target 1 monster in your GY; banish it, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Madolche" monster from your Deck, except "Madolche Hootcake". You can only use this effect of "Madolche Hootcake" once per turn.
eff: If this card in your possession is destroyed by an opponent's card and sent to your GY: Shuffle this card into the Deck. You can target 1 monster in your GY; banish it, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Madolche" monster from your Deck, except "Madolche Hootcake". You can only use this effect of "Madolche Hootcake" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Returns itself from Graveyard to Deck
